title: Advanced Education Statute Repeal Act
text: Advanced Education Statute Repeal Act 43 2018 November 8, 2018 524872423/709946006/1246127472 E3tlc18043 Repeal 1 The Public Education Flexibility and Choice Act , S.B.C. 2002, c. 3, is repealed. Commencement 2 This Act comes into force on the date of Royal Assent.
